criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking Increment button increases count by exactly 1
Pressing Up arrow key also increments count by exactly 1
criteriaResults.evidence: ArrowUp handler calls increment(); E2E confirms 1→2

criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking Decrement button decreases count by exactly 1
Pressing Down arrow key also decrements count by exactly 1
criteriaResults.evidence: ArrowDown handler calls decrement(); E2E confirms -1→-2

criteriaResults.criterion: Count can go below zero (no lower-bound restriction)
criteriaResults.evidence: No Math.max or min check in code; -1 and -2 display correctly

criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking Reset button sets count to exactly 0
Pressing R (case-insensitive) also resets count to 0
criteriaResults.evidence: e.key === 'r' || e.key === 'R'; E2E tests both cases

criteriaResults.criterion: Keyboard shortcuts work without requiring focus on any specific element
criteriaResults.evidence: Listener on document, not specific element; E2E confirms

criteriaResults.criterion: Count uses CSS class 'count' when count >= 0
criteriaResults.evidence: className set to 'count' when count >= 0; E2E confirms at count=0

criteriaResults.criterion: Count uses CSS class 'count--negative' when count < 0
criteriaResults.evidence: className set to 'count count--negative' when count < 0; E2E confirms at -1

criteriaResults.criterion: Color/class toggle happens immediately when crossing zero
criteriaResults.evidence: render() called on every action; E2E verifies instant toggle

criteriaResults.criterion: Each action appends to TOP of history log (newest-first)
criteriaResults.evidence: state.history.unshift(); E2E confirms first li shows count=11

criteriaResults.criterion: Each log entry shows action name, timestamp (HH:MM:SS), and count
criteriaResults.evidence: entry.time (HH:MM:SS via toTimeString().slice(0,8)), entry.action, entry.count all rendered
slice(0,10) applied when length > 10; E2E confirms exactly 10 after 11 clicks

criteriaResults.criterion: History log is empty on page load
criteriaResults.evidence: history: [] initial state; smoke E2E confirms 0 li elements

criteriaResults.criterion: No console errors during button clicks or keyboard shortcuts
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test monitors console errors across all actions: 0 errors

criteriaResults.criterion: All DOM mutations inside render() and renderHistory()
criteriaResults.evidence: Code analysis: countEl and historyEl only mutated inside these two functions

criteriaResults.criterion: E2E test file created in tests/e2e/counter.spec.ts covering all required scenarios
criteriaResults.evidence: File exists with 6 tests: increment, decrement, reset, keyboard, color toggle, history cap

criteriaResults.criterion: All existing E2E tests still pass (regression gate)

handoff.handoffNotes: All 19 acceptance criteria verified and passing. 10/10 E2E tests pass with zero regressions. Implementation correctly uses IIFE pattern, centralized state, render-on-change, document-level keyboard delegation, unshift for newest-first history, slice(0,10) for cap, and CSS class toggle for color.
